A 96

SONIC DRIVE-IN #6587

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: March 25, 2026

Is SONIC DRIVE-IN #6587 a safe place to eat? Yes — an A grade, 96/100, at its most recent inspection on March 25, 2026. That visit logged 4 basic violations.

On health score it's safer than 62% of Brevard County restaurants we grade. Diners rate it 3.8 from 1,146 reviews. Cuisine: American.

Get directions Call (321) 877-0728

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. March 25, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    0 high-priority · 0 intermediate · 4 basic

    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation

  2. November 7, 2025 · Complaint Full

    Call Back - Complied

    0 high-priority · 0 intermediate · 0 basic

    No violations cited.

  3. November 6, 2025 · Complaint Full

    Warning Issued

    1 high-priority · 2 intermediate · 9 basic

    • 01 — Food from approved source; safe, unadulterated, sound condition
    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage (×2)
    • 12 — Handwashing; employee eating/drinking/smoking practices
    • 13 — Clean clothes; hair restraints; jewelry; fingernails
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean
    • 29 — Plumbing installed & maintained; mop sink; backflow prevention (×3)
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation
    • 41 — Chemicals / toxic substances properly stored & used
